queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of the absence of a checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the association between checking account balances below 0 DM and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk stability associated with savings account balances below 100 DM.
